title: Rate limiting enforced
description: API must return 429 after 100 requests/minute per client

title: Bearer token auth
description: Endpoints must reject requests without valid JWT in Authorization header

title: JSON error responses
description: Errors must return RFC 7807 Problem Details format

title: Pagination headers
description: List endpoints must include X-Total-Count and Link headers

title: Request validation
description: Malformed JSON or missing required fields must return 400

title: Idempotency support
description: POST endpoints must support Idempotency-Key header

title: CORS headers configured
description: OPTIONS responses must include allowed origins

title: Request ID propagation
description: All responses must include X-Request-Id header

title: Response time SLA
description: 95th percentile response time must be under 200ms
